title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 confirms dates for its open beta and reignites the debate on mobility
summary: The open beta will take place from August 28 to September 1, as the community discusses movement speed.

title: Game of Thrones: War for Westeros delayed until 2027 to ensure its quality
summary: The real-time strategy game based on the HBO series postpones its release to achieve a high level of quality.

title: Valve warns that the RAM crisis is worsening and could make Steam Machines more expensive
summary: Valve engineers confirm that the memory shortage continues to worsen, which could lead to price increases for their devices.

title: Announced DCKO, a free DC fighting game for mobile that is not Injustice 3
summary: DCKO is a free-to-play title for iOS and Android, confirmed by multiple sources.

title: Jennifer English leaves the lead role of Tides of Annihilation, the second major claim the game loses
summary: The Baldur's Gate 3 actress leaves the protagonist role in the Arthurian RPG, joining the departure of another key figure.

title: A judge temporarily suspends the merger between Paramount and Warner Bros. for a minimum of 14 days
summary: The merger operation between the two major studios is put on hold by court order.

title: Forza Horizon 5 creative director says Game Pass was a good idea but it didn't work
summary: Dan Greenawalt believes that Xbox's subscription service did not achieve the expected success.

title: Kevin Feige takes the blame for the failure of the Blade movie with Mahershala Ali
summary: The president of Marvel Studios takes responsibility for the Blade project not taking off.

title: First trailer for Avengers: Doomsday shows Robert Downey Jr. as Doom and generates divided reactions
summary: The preview of the new Avengers movie features Downey as the villain, sparking mixed opinions.

title: British chain GAME enters administration with a debt of 16 million pounds
summary: The video game retailer has not been able to cope with competition and market trends.

title: Midgar Studio, developer of Edge of Memories, is liquidated after not finding a buyer
summary: The studio closes permanently despite having the game almost finished, a victim of Nacon's bankruptcy.

title: FBI arrests a young man who stole more than $200,000 with malicious games on Steam
summary: The accused used malware on titles like BlockBlasters to scam and spent the money on gift cards.

title: Neill Blomkamp releases an AI-generated movie that receives bad reviews
summary: The District 9 director launches a film created with artificial intelligence, rated as terrible by critics.

title: Christopher Nolan compares AI to a transparent Trojan horse in promotion for The Odyssey
summary: The director warns that artificial intelligence is an obvious danger that everyone can see.

title: Todd Howard confesses that he is a regular 'lurker' on Reddit and gets ideas from the site
summary: The Bethesda director reappears in forums to thank for support after the Fallout and Elder Scrolls announcements.

title: Valve rejects having exclusives for Steam Machine: 'It's not a good model for us'
summary: The company rules out game exclusivity for its platform, according to statements by Pierre-Loup Griffais.

title: Images of Kingdom Hearts Missing-Link leaked despite its cancellation, showing astronauts with Keyblades
summary: The canceled Kingdom Hearts spin-off continues to generate buzz with leaked material revealing unseen content.

title: Spain wins the World Cup and EA Sports FC gets the forecast right
summary: The Spanish team is crowned champion, while the game's simulations had already predicted it.

title: Cliff Bleszinski talks about his struggle with alcoholism and the development of Gears of War
summary: The designer reflects on his past, acknowledging that he developed much of the trilogy while hungover.

title: Ubisoft promises news about Ghost Recon in August and clears up doubts about Splinter Cell
summary: The publisher announces new updates for the Ghost Recon franchise, but rules out an update on the Splinter Cell remake.

title: The Blood of Dawnwalker promises to be an RPG without platform restrictions and with innovative ideas
summary: The medieval vampire role-playing game will offer save continuity and time jumps, following CD Projekt's philosophy.

title: Xbox reinforces its commitment to game exclusivity to justify buying its console
summary: Microsoft's management insists that there must be reasons to buy an Xbox, maintaining exclusive titles.

title: Activision confirms the setting of the Call of Duty movie, generating surprise
summary: The film adaptation of the franchise will have an unexpected context, according to official sources.
